data.snapshot:
- document:
  - navigation:
    - heading " AI 股票系统" [ref=e1] [level=5]
    - list:
      - listitem:
        - link " AI Agent 对话" [ref=e2]:
          - /url: /agent
      - listitem:
        - link " 仪表盘" [ref=e3]:
          - /url: "#"
      - listitem:
        - link " 模型管理" [ref=e4]:
          - /url: "#"
      - listitem:
        - link " 智能分析" [ref=e5]:
          - /url: "#"
      - listitem:
        - link " 我的收藏" [ref=e6]:
          - /url: "#"
      - listitem:
        - link " 财经新闻" [ref=e7]:
          - /url: "#"
      - listitem:
        - link " 全网热点雷达" [ref=e8]:
          - /url: "#"
      - listitem:
        - link " 全球态势监控" [ref=e9]:
          - /url: "#"
      - listitem:
        - link " 量化交易" [ref=e10]:
          - /url: "#"
      - listitem:
        - link " 定时任务" [ref=e11]:
          - /url: "#"
      - listitem:
        - link " 推送设置" [ref=e12]:
          - /url: "#"
      - listitem:
        - link " 用户管理" [ref=e13]:
          - /url: "#"
  - main:
    - heading "VNPY 量化交易中心" [ref=e14] [level=2]
    - text: 检查中...
    - button " 刷新" [ref=e15]
    - text:  模拟下单 交易网关
    - combobox [ref=e16]:
      - option "Futu (模拟)" [ref=e17] [selected]
      - option "OST (模拟)" [ref=e18]
    - text: 股票代码
    - 'textbox "如: AAPL"'
    - text: 方向
    - group:
      - radio "买入" [ref=e19] [checked]
      - text: 买入
      - radio "卖出" [ref=e20]
      - text: 卖出
    - text: 类型
    - combobox [ref=e21] [nth=1]:
      - option "限价单" [ref=e22] [selected]
      - option "市价单" [ref=e23]
    - text: 价格
    - spinbutton [ref=e24]
    - text: 数量
    - spinbutton [ref=e25] [nth=1]: "100"
    - button "提交订单" [ref=e26]
    - text:  账户资产
    - button " 模拟入金" [ref=e27]
    - paragraph: 可用资金
    - heading "¥800,000" [ref=e28] [level=5]
    - paragraph: 持仓市值
    - heading "¥51,050" [ref=e29] [level=5]
    - table:
      - rowgroup:
        - row "代码 数量 成本 现价 盈亏":
          - columnheader "代码" [ref=e30]
          - columnheader "数量" [ref=e31]
          - columnheader "成本" [ref=e32]
          - columnheader "现价" [ref=e33]
          - columnheader "盈亏" [ref=e34]
      - rowgroup:
        - row "暂无持仓":
          - cell "暂无持仓" [ref=e35]
    - text:  当日有效委托
    - table:
      - rowgroup:
        - row "代码 方向 价格/数量 操作":
          - columnheader "代码" [ref=e36] [nth=1]
          - columnheader "方向" [ref=e37]
          - columnheader "价格/数量" [ref=e38]
          - columnheader "操作" [ref=e39]
      - rowgroup:
        - row "暂无挂单":
          - cell "暂无挂单" [ref=e40]
    - text:  AI 量化策略管理
    - button " 新建策略" [ref=e41]
    - table:
      - rowgroup:
        - row "策略名称 标的 状态 操作":
          - columnheader "策略名称" [ref=e42]
          - columnheader "标的" [ref=e43]
          - columnheader "状态" [ref=e44]
          - columnheader "操作" [ref=e45] [nth=1]
      - rowgroup:
        - row "正在加载策略...":
          - cell "正在加载策略..." [ref=e46]
    - text:  策略运行日志与信号 > 等待策略启动...  策略回测中心
    - button " 开始回测" [ref=e47]
    - text: 选择策略
    - combobox [ref=e48] [nth=2]:
      - option "AI 趋势追踪" [ref=e49] [selected]
      - option "网格交易" [ref=e50]
    - text: 回测标的
    - textbox "AAPL" [ref=e51]
    - text: 回测区间
    - textbox [ref=e52]: 2024-01-01
    - textbox [ref=e53] [nth=1]: 2024-12-31
    - text: 初始资金
    - spinbutton [ref=e54] [nth=2]: "1000000"
    - text:  请设置回测参数并点击上方按钮开始分析
